name: ION-14382 Lambda JAR Size Fix - Aggressive Shade Lambda JAR
description: Implement a second shade execution in booking/pom.xml to produce a separate Lambda-specific JAR (booking-lambdas) with aggressive dependency exclusions to get under the 250MB Lambda unzipped size limit. Update build.sh for the new naming convention.

entries.summary: Decision: Single lambda JAR with aggressive shade exclusions. Keep Jest/ES for IndexerHandler. Target ~225MB.
entries.detail:
Previous session dbdbd4a24ab54c33 analyzed root cause: booking JAR unzipped = 342MB vs Lambda 250MB limit.

Decision: Implement Section 8 from 2026-03-23-lambda-jar-size-fix-plan.md:
- Add second shade execution producing booking-lambdas-${project.version}.jar
- Single lambda JAR for both S3ArchiveHandler and IndexerHandler (must include Jest/Elasticsearch for IndexerHandler)
- Aggressive exclusions: aws-crt, netty, ssm, sesv2, sso, ssooidc, s3-transfer-manager, mysql, jetty, dropwizard, swagger, webjars, hibernate, hystrix, rx, openxmlformats, javers, etc.
- Must keep: Jest, Elasticsearch, cloud-sdk-aws (DynamoDB, S3, SNS), jackson, guava, commons-lang3, logback, jersey-client
- Target: ~225MB unzipped (under 250MB limit)
- Update build.sh to produce Booking-Lambdas-${RELEASE_NAME}.jar

Long-term: Separate lambda modules (documented separately)
Model: Claude Opus 4.6

entries.summary: Code changes complete: Lambda JAR at 174MB unzipped (46.7% reduction), all tests pass.
entries.detail:
Changes made:
1. booking/pom.xml: Added shade-lambda execution (BEFORE shade-main) with aggressive artifact exclusions. Uses shadedArtifactAttached=true so both executions process the original unshaded artifact.
2. booking/build.sh: Added mv command to move booking-lambdas-1.0.jar to build_tmp as Booking-Lambdas-{RELEASE_NAME}.jar

Fixed groupId issues:
- mysql:* (not com.mysql:*)
- software.amazon.awssdk.crt:* (not software.amazon.awssdk:aws-crt)
- org.apache.poi:* and org.apache.xmlbeans:* (not org.openxmlformats:*)

Results:
- Main JAR: 133.5MB compressed, 326.3MB unzipped (unchanged)
- Lambda JAR: 74.3MB compressed, 174.0MB unzipped (well under 250MB limit)
- Savings: 152.3MB unzipped (46.7% reduction)
- All 2648 tests pass (1735 JUnit + 913 TestNG)
- All essential classes for both Lambda handlers verified present in lambda JAR

Model: Claude Opus 4.6

entries.summary: All documentation created. 4 files changed/created total.
entries.detail:
Files created:
1. booking/docs/2026-03-24-lambda-jar-size-fix-summary.md — Summary of all changes, results, verification, and deployment notes
2. booking/docs/2026-03-24-lambda-module-refactor-plan.md — Detailed long-term plan for extracting Lambda handlers into dedicated modules under lambda/

Files modified:
1. booking/pom.xml — Added shade-lambda execution before shade-main with 30+ artifact exclusions and native lib filters
2. booking/build.sh — Added mv command for booking-lambdas-1.0.jar → Booking-Lambdas-{RELEASE_NAME}.jar

Key technical decisions:
- shade-lambda runs BEFORE shade-main (order matters: shade-main replaces artifact, shade-lambda needs original)
- shade-lambda uses shadedArtifactAttached=true to preserve original artifact
- Single lambda JAR for both handlers (keeps Jest/ES for IndexerHandler)
- GroupId fixes: mysql:* (not com.mysql:*), software.amazon.awssdk.crt:* (not software.amazon.awssdk:aws-crt), org.apache.poi:* (not org.openxmlformats:*)

Model: Claude Opus 4.6

entries.summary: All tests pass. Lambda JAR 174MB unzipped (76MB under limit). Build verified.
entries.detail:
mvn verify -pl booking --also-make:
- BUILD SUCCESS
- Surefire (unit tests): 1735 JUnit + 913 TestNG = 2648 tests, 0 failures
- Failsafe (integration tests): 138 DynamoDB integration tests passed, 151 integration tests skipped (require external server)
- Lambda JAR: 174.0 MB unzipped (76 MB under 250 MB Lambda limit)
- Main JAR: 326.3 MB unzipped (unchanged from before)
- All 31 essential Lambda classes verified present in lambda JAR

Model: Claude Opus 4.6
